proto = Path('governance/protocols/CURATOR_INTAKE_CONTRACT.md')
proto.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
samples_dir = Path('governance/transport/samples')
samples_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_01_curator_intake_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_01_curator_intake.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

proto.write_text('# BEM-531.01 | Curator Intake Contract

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 12:49 (UTC+3)

## Scope
Curator is the single entry point for BEM-531 internal role contour. Active sources in BEM-531: GPT and Claude. Telegram is reserved/deferred.

## Curator FSM
RECEIVED -> TRIAGED -> ASSIGNED -> WAITING_ROLE -> REVIEWING -> CLOSED

## Intake record schema
```json
{
  "record_type": "curator_intake",
  "cycle_id": "string",
  "source": "gpt|claude|telegram_deferred",
  "source_ref": "string",
  "request_title": "string",
  "request_body": "string",
  "priority": "low|normal|high",
  "curator_status": "RECEIVED|TRIAGED|ASSIGNED|WAITING_ROLE|REVIEWING|CLOSED",
  "next_role": "analyst|auditor|executor|curator",
  "blocker": null,
  "created_at": "UTC+3 timestamp"
}
```

## Assignment rules
- New ambiguous task -> analyst.
- Patch-ready task -> auditor before executor.
- Approved patch -> executor.
- Executor result -> auditor final check.
- Final PASS/BLOCKER -> curator closure.

## Telegram policy
Telegram branch is part of the broader architecture but deferred out of BEM-531 execution scope. Records may reserve `source=telegram_deferred`, but no Telegram E2E is required in BEM-531.
')

gpt_sample = {'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':'bem531-sample-gpt','source':'gpt','source_ref':'external-gpt-auditor','request_title':'Sample GPT intake','request_body':'Analyze internal role contour task','priority':'normal','curator_status':'ASSIGNED','next_role':'analyst','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:49 (UTC+3)'}
claude_sample = {'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':'bem531-sample-claude','source':'claude','source_ref':'external-claude-auditor','request_title':'Sample Claude review intake','request_body':'Review roadmap architecture','priority':'normal','curator_status':'ASSIGNED','next_role':'auditor','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:49 (UTC+3)'}
telegram_sample = {'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':'bem531-sample-telegram-deferred','source':'telegram_deferred','source_ref':'telegram-webhook','request_title':'Deferred Telegram intake sample','request_body':'Reserved for future scope','priority':'normal','curator_status':'RECEIVED','next_role':'curator','blocker':'deferred_out_of_bem531_scope','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:49 (UTC+3)'}
(samples_dir/'curator_intake_gpt_sample.json').write_text(json.dumps(gpt_sample, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')
(samples_dir/'curator_intake_claude_sample.json').write_text(json.dumps(claude_sample, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')
(samples_dir/'curator_intake_telegram_deferred_sample.json').write_text(json.dumps(telegram_sample, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

report.write_text('# BEM-531.01 | Curator Intake | PASS

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 12:49 (UTC+3)

## Blocker
null
')
